description: Visual drag-and-drop pipeline designer for multi-agent workflows. Wire together Input, Agent, Transform, and Output nodes to build and execute Claude-powered AI pipelines in the browser.
features: Visual canvas with drag-and-drop node placement
Four node types: Input, Agent (Claude), Transform, Output
Directed acyclic graph (DAG) execution with topological sort
Real-time status indicators (idle / running / done / error)
Multi-agent fan-out and merge — nodes can have multiple inputs and outputs
Agent nodes configurable with system prompt and model (Haiku/Sonnet)
Transform nodes for prompt-based text manipulation
Animated edges showing data flow direction
In-browser API key management (stored in localStorage)
Pre-loaded example pipeline on first load
